jobs.title: Business Development Manager
jobs.content: <p><strong>Business Development Manager</strong></p><p>Celonis is the global leader in Process Intelligence and the pioneer of Process Mining technology — drive enterprise account expansion across the EMEA region.</p>

jobs.title: Field CTO
jobs.content: <p>Lead Celonis's Field CTO function across the platform stack — architect end-to-end Process Intelligence transformations for Fortune 500 customers.</p>
